merge.title: Merge previous orders
merge.intro: If you placed orders as a guest using this email address before creating an account, you can merge them into your account here.
merge.empty: We didn't find any previous guest orders matching your account email.
merge.contactCsr: Please contact our customer service to merge previous guest orders.

summary.title: What we found
summary.orderCount: %count% guest order(s) using your account email

cta.disclaimer: We will send a verification link and a code to your account email. Nothing is merged until you click the link or read the code to our customer service team.

pending.exists: A confirmation email has already been sent. It expires at %expiresAt%. If you didn't receive it, please contact customer service.

confirm.title: Confirm merging your guest orders
confirm.intro: Please confirm you want to merge the following previous guest orders into your account:
confirm.orderCount: %count% order(s) will be moved to your account
confirm.warning: This action cannot be undone. The original guest customer records will be removed and the orders will appear in your account history.

success.title: Orders merged successfully
success.message: %count% previous order(s) have been added to your account.

error.title: We couldn't process your request
error.selfServiceDisabled: Self-service merge is currently disabled. Please contact customer service.

flash.verificationSent: A confirmation email has been sent to %email%. Please click the link to merge your previous orders.
flash.guestOrdersDetected: We found %count% previous guest order(s) using this email. Visit your account to merge them.
